Home → Demo Hub

Enterprise Review Portal

Stakeholder Demo Hub — The Agent Command Center

This hub collects the public review surfaces for The Agent Command Center through MVP-68. It includes the original stakeholder demo, exact registry, static simulator, controlled runtime ladder, full-fleet review surfaces, observability, executive review, enterprise pilot planning, and enterprise pilot packet export.

MVP-68 Enterprise Pilot Packet Exporter Raw Activate All Disabled Staged Activation Required Enterprise Review Portal

Latest public milestone: MVP-68 — Enterprise Pilot Packet Exporter.

Runtime remains scoped, gated, audited, and controlled. Raw activate all, arbitrary shell execution, arbitrary SQL, deploy execution, rollback execution, alert sending, and unrestricted automation remain disabled.

Executive Control Room Enterprise Pilot Packet Open Presentation Mode
Latest milestone MVP-68 Enterprise Pilot Packet
Agent count 47,979 Exact registered agents
Department count 1,777 Across 11 domains
Safety gates Verified Zero-Live-Agents default

Review Surfaces

Core stakeholder paths

Executive Control Room

Role-aware executive view for reviewing safety boundaries, observability, and next decisions.

Open Executive Control Room

Enterprise Pilot Packet Exporter

Generate a shareable pilot packet with executive summary, success criteria, and risks.

Open Enterprise Pilot Packet Exporter

Full 47,979-Agent Runtime Fleet

Scale to the full registered fleet through approved department gates, staged unlocks, and circuit breakers.

Open Full 47,979-Agent Runtime Fleet

Full-Fleet Load Test

Stress-test the control system with simulated load, failure scenarios, and recovery drills.

Open Full-Fleet Load Test

Full-Fleet Observability Command Wall

Unified view for fleet scale, gates, stages, cohorts, circuit breakers, and audit health.

Open Full-Fleet Observability Command Wall

Enterprise Pilot Room

Pilot-ready review room with scope, stakeholder roles, and go/no-go decision support.

Open Enterprise Pilot Room

Continual Harness Operator Mode

Active operator integration with permission scopes, allowlisted operations, and audit logging.

Open Continual Harness Operator Mode

Command Center Sandbox Simulator

Safe request pipeline walk-through without live execution.

Open Command Center Sandbox Simulator

Runtime Foundation

Review the schemas, contracts, and checklists required before live runtime activation.

Open Runtime Foundation

Runtime Kernel

Private runtime evaluation with backend persistence and approval flow.

Open Runtime Kernel

Runtime Agent Control

Supervised single-agent test surface.

Open Runtime Agent Control

10-Agent Runtime Squad

Controlled 10-agent supervised squad.

Open 10-Agent Runtime Squad

100-Agent Runtime Battalion

Controlled 100-agent supervised battalion.

Open 100-Agent Runtime Battalion

250-Agent Runtime Company

Controlled 250-agent supervised company.

Open 250-Agent Runtime Company

500-Agent Runtime Group

Controlled 500-agent supervised group.

Open 500-Agent Runtime Group

1,000-Agent Runtime Division

Controlled 1,000-agent supervised division.

Open 1,000-Agent Runtime Division

1,777-Department Runtime Map

Map all departments to supervised runtime readiness.

Open 1,777-Department Runtime Map

Department-Gated Runtime Expansion

Approve department gates and activate capacity by department.

Open Department-Gated Runtime Expansion

5,000-Agent Runtime Corps

Scale supervised runtime capacity up to a 5,000-agent cap.

Open 5,000-Agent Runtime Corps

20,000-Agent Runtime Army

Scale supervised runtime capacity toward a 20,000-agent cap.

Open 20,000-Agent Runtime Army

Agent Registry

Source-traceable exact counts, family breakdowns, and hierarchy view.

Open Agent Registry

Safety Boundaries

Detailed readout of the runtime capabilities that remain disabled.

Open Safety Boundaries

Technical Appendix

Implementation notes, validator strategy, and future runtime activation gates.

Open Technical Appendix

Review QA Checklist

Seven-persona review readiness checklist for the final stakeholder pass.

Open Review QA Checklist

System scale snapshot

Verified counts from the repo

Registered Agents

47,979 agents and 1,777 departments derived from `org_chart_export.json`.

Readiness Layers

Validated through MVP-68.

Validator Scripts

280+ Python validators enforcing safety and state.

Safety Boundary

13 disabled capability categories in the presentation manifest.

Glossary

Key project terms

MVP-68

Current enterprise review milestone: Enterprise Pilot Packet Exporter.

Registered agent

A registered command-center operating unit listed in the static org-chart registry.

Live runtime agent

A controlled runtime process or capacity record. Not unrestricted execution.

Enterprise Pilot Packet

A shareable review package containing summary, safety boundaries, and decision support.

© 2026 Devin O’Rourke. All rights reserved.

Agent Command Center, the demo pages, registry presentation, dashboard copy, visual layout, simulator materials, validator descriptions, and stakeholder presentation materials are protected project materials. No license, sale, transfer, or permission to reuse is granted by viewing this demo.

This site is a public stakeholder review surface. Some pages are static demonstrations, and some pages may be controlled backend-wired status, audit, readiness, approval, or export surfaces. No page enables raw activate all, arbitrary shell execution, arbitrary SQL, command execution, deployment actions, rollback execution, alert sending, or unrestricted automation.

Third-party names, platforms, and services referenced for context remain the property of their respective owners.
